task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the ADAudit Plus web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to http://localhost:8081/ displaying the ADAudit Plus login screen or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent investigated account management events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ADAudit Plus interface showing reports related to Local Account Management, such as User Creation, User Modification, Password Resets, or Group Membership changes.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent investigated failed logon attempts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ADAudit Plus interface showing reports related to Local Logon Failures or invalid logon attempts.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the new technician account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ADAudit Plus Admin/Delegation settings showing the creation or existence of a technician account with the username 'soc_analyst1' and the role 'Operator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented the discovered usernames and event types in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., Notepad) open with 'account_threat_report.txt' containing lists of discovered users (e.g., jsmith, baduser1, dlee) and the specific event types associated with them.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented recommended remediation steps in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'account_threat_report.txt' containing recommended remediation steps (e.g., resetting passwords, disabling accounts, blocking IPs) based on the investigation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ADAudit Plus GUI for investigation rather than reading backend logs or running scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be navigating the ADAudit Plus web interface to view reports, not using PowerShell or opening raw log files in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created the technician account via the ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the ADAudit Plus Admin/Technicians web UI to add the user, rather than using backend database commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually compiled the report rather than just copying the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file should contain actual usernames discovered from the ADAudit Plus interface (e.g., jsmith, baduser1), not just a copy-paste of the task description instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected technician account to be created in ADAudit Plus is 'soc_analyst1' with the role 'Operator'. The investigation report must be saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\account_threat_report.txt'. The report should identify account management event users (jsmith, mjohnson, rwilliams, abrown, dlee) and failed logon users (baduser1, baduser2, wrongadmin, testattacker, bruteforce1). The user 'dlee' specifically has both a password reset and multiple failed logons.
